hooks.command: FILE="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; case "$FILE" in *.go) goimports -w "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || gofmt -w "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true; go vet ./... 2>&1 | head -10 || true;; esac
case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in go.sum) echo 'BLOCKED: Do not edit go.sum directly. Use go get / go mod tidy instead.' >&2; exit 2;; esac
